description: Applies a glowing border outline to specified shapes with optional customization
utility: Highlight shapes with a visible glow effect for emphasis

arguments.name: shapes
arguments.description: One or more shape variable references to outline

arguments.name: color
arguments.description: Custom outline color using c() expression (default: #ff6b6b red)

arguments.name: opacity
arguments.description: Glow opacity using fo() expression (default: varies by context)

examples.scenario: Outline with notes for equilateral angles
Outline the final result of a computation
Outline selected term from equation for emphasis
